metadata.title: Build an AGENTS.md Generator for Any Coding Project with Codex
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: NO RENDERABLE BEATS: no beat carries a shot.remotion.pattern or Manim annotation — the pipeline will render NOTHING and every slot becomes a YOU-slate. The sheet was authored without the scene contract.
B00: palette=claude but the cold open is 'un-annotated' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B09: palette=claude but the outro is 'un-annotated' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: This is Liam, in for Bear. Every session where you re-explain your project's conventions is time you spent paying for a file you could have created in 20 minutes.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: This is Liam, in for Bear. Every session where you re-explain your project's conventions is time you spent paying for a file you could have created in 20 minute

beats.narration_text: AGENTS.md is a communication protocol between you and a stateless collaborator. Codex starts every session with no memory of the last. The 20 minutes it takes to write AGENTS.md is repaid at the start of every subsequent session — but only if the file contains what Codex can't infer from the code, not what it already knows.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: AGENTS.md is a communication protocol between you and a stateless collaborator. Codex starts every session with no memory of the last. The 20 minutes it takes t

beats.narration_text: claude "Read this project directory and generate a first-draft AGENTS.md. Five sections: Stack, Style, Architecture, Environment, Lessons learned. Tag each entry: INFERABLE if Codex knows it from code, or NEEDS HUMAN INPUT if not visible in code. Under 80 lines." < project_files_listing.txt

props.command: claude "Read this project directory and generate a first-draft AGENTS.md. Five sections: Stack, Style, Architecture, Environment, Lessons learned. Tag each entry: [INFERABLE] or [NEEDS HUMAN INPUT]. Under 80 lines." < project_files_listing.txt

build.suggested: suggested prompt: claude "Read this project directory and generate a first-draft AGENTS.md. Five sections: Stack, Style, Architecture, Environment, Lessons learned. Tag each entr

beats.narration_text: agents_md_generator.py — reads project directory, generates draft with INFERABLE/NEEDS HUMAN INPUT tags, produces cleaned final removing INFERABLE entries.

props.code:
# reads project directory, tags entries, produces cleaned AGENTS.md
import agents_drafter

draft = agents_drafter.generate(project_dir='.')
tagged = agents_drafter.tag(draft)  # INFERABLE | NEEDS HUMAN INPUT
cleaned = agents_drafter.filter_inferable(tagged)
agents_drafter.write(cleaned, path='AGENTS.md')

build.suggested: suggested prompt: agents_md_generator.py — reads project directory, generates draft with INFERABLE/NEEDS HUMAN INPUT tags, produces cleaned final removing INFERABLE entries.

beats.narration_text: Draft generated: 23 entries. 14 tagged INFERABLE — GDScript snake_case convention, Godot 4.x API, standard scene structure — all visible in the code. 9 tagged NEEDS HUMAN INPUT: the export key path, the lesson about packed scenes copying by value, the deployment target, and 6 architectural decisions not derivable from code structure. Cleaned final: 9 entries, under 40 lines.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Draft generated: 23 entries. 14 tagged INFERABLE — GDScript snake_case convention, Godot 4.x API, standard scene structure — all visible in the code. 9 tagged N

beats.narration_text: Run the generator on the same project 6 weeks later after lessons have been added.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Run the generator on the same project 6 weeks later after lessons have been added.

beats.narration_text: Lessons learned section now has 4 entries — packed scenes copy by value; export key requires absolute path; AnimationPlayer nodes must be child of animated node; delta accumulation needed for frame-independent motion. Stack, Style, Architecture, Environment sections unchanged — they stabilized after the first run. The file grew in exactly the section designed to grow.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Lessons learned section now has 4 entries — packed scenes copy by value; export key requires absolute path; AnimationPlayer nodes must be child of animated node

beats.narration_text: The INFERABLE/NEEDS HUMAN INPUT split is the key discipline. An AGENTS.md full of things Codex already knows from code is noise — it makes the file longer without making Codex more accurate. The productive entries are the ones that aren't in the code: past mistakes, deployment quirks, architectural decisions made and closed.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The INFERABLE/NEEDS HUMAN INPUT split is the key discipline. An AGENTS.md full of things Codex already knows from code is noise — it makes the file longer witho
